name: libtext-charwidth-perl
title: libtext-charwidth-perl
summary: get display widths of characters on the terminal
description:
get display widths of characters on the terminal
Text::CharWidth permits one to get the display widths of characters
and strings on the terminal, using wcwidth() and wcswidth() from libc.
.
It provides mbwidth(), mbswidth(), and mblen().
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtext-charwidth-perl because get display widths of characters on the terminal.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtext-charwidth-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtext-charwidth-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtext-charwidth-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
